Frequently asked questions

How many lawyers are in Cobb County, GA?

344 lawyers and law firms across 8 cities in Cobb County are listed here, 233 firms and 111 solo attorneys.

Which cities in Cobb County have lawyers listed?

Marietta (242), Kennesaw (55), Smyrna (12), Acworth (11), Austell (8), Powder Springs (8), Mableton (7), Vinings (1).

Who is a top rated lawyer in Cobb County?

The Law Office of Lawrence J. Zimmerman in Marietta is among the highest rated, with 5.0 stars across 166 reviews.
